title: Moon Base Construction
body:
The hypothesis of using a low-gravity chamber as a possible cryptid trap is a worthwhile endeavor, we need to keep exploring this theory.

Obviously we don’t have any cryptids on hand to actually test this right now, but maybe we can work towards simulating or synthesizing one??

In the meantime we should look into a more efficient re-build process for these Moonboxes. It is pretty laborious to build them and there are many more things to test in low gravity environments.

- T-Group
‎
